name_en: Top-tier original with full set of packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original with full set of packaging
Mini Montaigne Grey Monogram Series 🌫. I have nothing to say, it's just too cute 🥰. For those who feel the Montaigne bag is too big, you can choose this small size 🙋🏻‍♀️. Cute and convenient, with a decent capacity; two large phones fit perfectly 👌. The wide strap makes it very comfortable to carry daily 💝.
size:18*5*11.5cm
